raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 2234 will create a framework for local governments to process residential building permits more efficiently and cost-effectively across the state.",
    "Many projects spend months awaiting building permit approval.",
    "Long delays in building permit approval add to the overall cost of building homes across California.",
    "AB 2234 will require developers to provide full and complete applications for their building permits.",
    "Local jurisdictions will be required to promptly respond with necessary feedback regarding complete applications under AB 2234.",
    "Improving the post-entitlement building permit process will strengthen communication between local governments and builders.",
    "The post-entitlement building permitting process is a roadblock that causes lengthy and costly delays in building new homes.",
    "Delivering more affordable housing is crucial for strengthening California's business competitiveness.",
    "AB 2234 will bring much-needed transparency and certainty to addressing California's housing shortage."
  ]
}
```
